Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% in Kencana Helios Sdn Bhd and Associated Placement Financing by Seri Mekar Energi Berhad (Reg. No. 202201012345 [fictitious]) listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad.
Counterparties: Seri Mekar Energi Berhad (Issuer); Bayu Nusantara Capital Sdn Bhd (Investor; Reg. No. 201901234567 [fictitious]); Kencana Helios Sdn Bhd (Target; Reg. No. 201401112233 [fictitious]).
Consideration: RM180,000,000 for 70% equity in Target; funding via RM120,000,000 cash and RM60,000,000 private placement of new Issuer shares to Investor at up to 10% discount to 5-day VWAP on Bursa Securities, subject to Bursa approval for listing and quotation.
Pricing mechanics: VWAP measured for the 5 full Market Days prior to price-fixing date; adjustment for dividends or corporate actions; long-stop date 30 September 2025.
Conditions precedent: Issuer and Target board approvals; shareholders’ approval for a major transaction under Chapter 10 of the Main Market Listing Requirements; Bursa approval for new issue; any required clearance from Securities Commission Malaysia for placement structure; satisfactory due diligence and SPA execution.
Disclosure status: Until an immediate announcement is made via Bursa LINK pursuant to Paragraph 9.03, the information herein is non-public, price-sensitive “material information” and must not be selectively disclosed; CMSA insider trading prohibitions apply to all recipients.
Closed Period and blackout: The Issuer expects a Closed Period commencing 30 days before its Q2 FY2025 results announcement (targeted late August 2025); no dealing by directors/principal officers, and Investor to confirm it will refrain from trading the Issuer’s securities until the relevant Bursa announcement(s) are released.
Timeline: Target signing of SPA and placement subscription agreements by 15 July 2025; immediate Bursa announcement upon signing; EGM notice within 6 weeks of signing; completion within 3 months post-approvals.
Use of proceeds: Partly to fund acquisition consideration, partly to refinance revolving facilities at subsidiary Seri Mekar Solar One Sdn Bhd; no proceeds to be used for share buy-backs during the Restricted Period under the Listing Requirements.
Public information carve-out: The Issuer’s audited FY2024 results released via Bursa LINK on 12 February 2025 and the 7 May 2025 press release on the Seri Mekar Puteri Solar Farm commissioning are already public and are not MNPI; industry tariff consultations by the Energy Commission are public and non-issuer specific.
Confidentiality and controls: Existing NDA dated 4 June 2025 remains in force; recipients will be wall-crossed and recorded on an insider list; onward disclosure to analysts or media is prohibited until after Bursa announcement and publication on the Issuer’s website.
Covenants and interim conduct: Target to operate in the ordinary course; no new indebtedness >RM10,000,000, no dividends or asset disposals without Issuer consent; any leak will trigger an immediate holding announcement to Bursa Securities.
Exclusivity and break fee: 45-day exclusivity from date of this term sheet; no-shop and no-talk undertakings by Target shareholders; break fee of RM3,000,000 payable by Target shareholders if they accept a superior proposal during exclusivity.
Conditions subsequent: Appointment of an independent valuer for circular to shareholders; preparation of a draft circular and independent advice letter if required; submission to Bursa within the prescribed timelines under the Listing Requirements.
Contacts: Dato’ Amir Hakim Salleh (Group CEO) and Pn. Azlina Farhana Yusoff (Company Secretary), Seri Mekar Energi Berhad; email: azlina.yusoff@serimekar.com.my; investorqueries@serimekar.com.my.
